description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant red background and bold white branding, characteristic of a Coca-Cola soft drink container. The can features the iconic Coca-Cola script logo in large, flowing white letters, wrapping around the body, with the word 'Coke' prominently displayed on one side. Nutritional and product information, as well as a barcode, are printed in smaller white text on the back. The can has a standard pull-tab top, made of silver-colored metal, and a smooth, glossy finish. The surface is free of dents, scratches, or visible wear, and the can appears unopened. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a slightly tapered top and bottom for easy handling.
description: A tall, glossy red Coca-Cola can with bold white branding and a silver pull-tab top, featuring smooth, undamaged surfaces and detailed product labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, flowing Coca-Cola script logo in white on a red background.
description_view_1: Back view displaying nutritional information, barcode, and smaller Coca-Cola branding in white text.
description_view_2: Side view with the word 'Coke' in large white letters, occupying most of the visible surface.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the curve of the white logo and the red background, with partial Coca-Cola script visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white Coca-Cola script logo, 'Coke' in bold white letters, nutritional information, barcode, and product details in white text on a red background.
